name: license-attribution sweep dry-run reports planned validation actions without writing report files
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/license-attribution.sh" --dry-run --out licenses.json 2>out.txt && [ ! -f licenses.json ] && grep -q 'planned: validate plugins' out.txt && grep -q 'planned: validate attestations' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
